voice_observations.caption_text:
The inaugural 𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐗 𝐆𝐀𝐌𝐄𝐒 is happening on 𝐉𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝟔𝐭𝐡 - expect a high-energy hybrid fitness race built to test endurance, strength, and ability to perform under pressure. 🏃‍♂️💥🥇

Featuring running blocks, functional fitness stations, live competition energy, and an arena atmosphere like no other. 🏆

Whether you’re stepping onto the floor to compete or showing up to spectate the action, this is an event you don’t want to miss. 🙌🚀

Learn more about the event and sign up through their website! 👊
#𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘𝐀𝐓𝐅𝐈𝐓𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐅𝐈𝐑𝐒𝐓 ❤️

#FitnessFirstMe #Aboveandbeyond #GoFurtherWithFitnessFirst #ApexGames
